def negative_dataclass_heavy_post_init():
    rule_id = "dataclass_heavy_post_init"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Dataclass __post_init__ methods that perform I/O, subprocess, network, or heavyweight client setup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
